---
title: "Release Process"
format:
  html:
    output-file: release.html
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

## Purpose

This page explains the release lifecycle for the **IPBES Data Management Vision**:

- what runs on pull requests,
- what runs when a GitHub release is published,
- how GitHub Actions interacts with Zenodo,
- and where manual Zenodo publish/minting begins.

## System Overview

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
  A["Pull Request to main"] --> B["PR Checks workflow"]
  B --> C["Render pages: index, older-releases, release (hidden)"]
  B --> D["Render PDF artifact"]
  B --> E["Assert expected files"]

  F["GitHub Release published"] --> G["Release Publish workflow"]
  G --> H["Resolve Zenodo target (sandbox|production)"]
  H --> I["Read version + concept_doi from frontmatter"]
  I --> J["Reserve Zenodo version DOI"]
  J --> K["Build HTML/PDF with reserved DOI"]
  K --> L["Upload PDF + release notes to Zenodo draft"]
  K --> M["Upload PDF to GitHub Release assets"]
  K --> N["Deploy _site to gh-pages"]
  L --> O["Manual Zenodo publish/mint"]
```

## PR Validation Flow

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  PR["PR opened or updated"] --> S1["Checkout + setup R/Quarto/TinyTeX"]
  S1 --> S2["Render website HTML"]
  S2 --> S3["Render PDF artifact"]
  S3 --> S4["Assert required artifacts"]
  S4 --> RES["Pass/Fail status"]
```

Expected PR artifacts:

1. `_site/index.html`
2. `_site/older-releases.html`
3. `_site/assets/IPBES-Data-Management-Vision-latest.pdf`

## Release Publish Flow

```{mermaid}
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as Maintainer
  participant GH as GitHub Actions
  participant Z as Zenodo
  participant GR as GitHub Release
  participant GP as gh-pages

  U->>GR: Publish release
  GH->>GH: Resolve ZENODO_TARGET
  GH->>GH: Read version + concept_doi
  GH->>Z: Create new draft version and reserve DOI
  Z-->>GH: Reserved DOI + draft deposition id
  GH->>GR: Append "Version DOI: https://doi.org/<doi>"
  GH->>GH: Build website and PDF (using IPBES_DOI)
  GH->>Z: Upload PDF + release notes to draft
  GH->>GR: Upload PDF asset
  GH->>GP: Deploy _site
  Note over Z,U: Draft remains unpublished.\nMinting is manual in Zenodo UI.
```

## Stage Matrix

| Stage | Trigger | Automation | Output |
|---|---|---|---|
| PR check | Pull request | `pr-check.yml` | Validation status + artifacts |
| Target selection | Release publish | `release.yml` | Active Zenodo base/token |
| DOI reservation | Release publish | `release.yml` + Zenodo | Reserved version DOI |
| Build | Release publish | `release.yml` | HTML + versioned PDF |
| Zenodo draft upload | Release publish | `release.yml` + Zenodo | Draft updated (PDF + notes) |
| GitHub release upload | Release publish | `release.yml` | PDF asset on release |
| Deploy | Release publish | `release.yml` | Updated `_site` on `gh-pages` |
| Final publish/mint | Manual | Zenodo UI | Minted/published record |

## Configuration

Repository variables and secrets:

1. `ZENODO_TARGET`: `sandbox` or `production` (defaults to `production` if unset/invalid)
2. `ZENODO_API_BASE`: production Zenodo API base
3. `ZENODO_SANDBOX_API_BASE`: sandbox Zenodo API base
4. `ZENODO_TOKEN`: production token (used when `ZENODO_TARGET=production`)
5. `ZENODO_SANDBOX_TOKEN`: sandbox token (used when `ZENODO_TARGET=sandbox`)

Switching environment is done by changing only `ZENODO_TARGET`.

## Frontmatter Inputs

The release workflow reads these fields from `IPBES_Data_Vision.qmd` frontmatter:

1. `version`
2. `concept_doi`
3. `release_date`
4. `release_notes`
5. `editors`
6. `contact_email`

Behavior rules:

1. Reserved DOI is injected as `IPBES_DOI` at release build time.
2. If DOI is unavailable, output displays `**Will be inserted upon release**`.
3. `concept_doi` is used for latest-version reference and all-releases lookup.
4. `ZENODO_CONCEPTRECID` is derived from `concept_doi`.

## Failure Conditions

Release workflow fails on:

1. Missing/invalid `version` or `concept_doi`.
2. Missing selected base/token for active `ZENODO_TARGET`.
3. Zenodo DOI reservation failure.
4. Build failure.
5. Zenodo draft upload failure.
6. GitHub release asset upload failure.
7. `gh-pages` deployment failure.

## Post-Release Checklist

1. Workflow run is green.
2. Site is updated on `gh-pages`.
3. GitHub release has attached PDF.
4. HTML/PDF show reserved DOI.
5. Zenodo draft contains uploaded PDF and release notes.
6. Release notes include exactly one DOI line.
7. Zenodo draft is published manually when ready.

## Change Log

- 2026-03-04: Initial release automation specification created.
- 2026-03-18: Updated to pre-reserve Zenodo DOI and append DOI to GitHub release notes.
- 2026-03-18: Converted to Quarto (`RELEASE.qmd`) and rendered as hidden `release.html`.
- 2026-03-18: Added Mermaid diagrams and stage-oriented release documentation.
